title: Build embedding pipeline and pgvector storage for document chunks
description: After extraction, chunk document text and generate embeddings using text-embedding-3-small. Store chunks with their vector embeddings in DocumentChunk table via pgvector. This enables semantic search in the RAG pipeline.

acceptance_criteria.text: Document text chunked at 512 tokens with 64 token overlap
Each chunk embedded with text-embedding-3-small (1536 dimensions)
DocumentChunk records with vector embeddings stored in Postgres via pgvector
Chunking and embedding runs after successful extraction
pgvector cosine similarity index created on the embedding column

steps: Create lib/ai/chunking.ts with token-aware chunking using tiktoken
Create lib/ai/embeddings.ts wrapping OpenAI embeddings API
Create lib/db/vectors.ts for pgvector insert and similarity search helpers
Add cosine similarity index migration: CREATE INDEX ON document_chunks USING ivfflat (embedding vector_cosine_ops)
Integrate embedding step into pipeline.ts after extraction
risks: tiktoken WASM bundle size — may need dynamic import
pgvector ivfflat index requires minimum row count before it's effective — use brute force (exact) search for small datasets
